data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events.

The prior steps focus on various customer interactions and booking processes but do not address the specific functionality or expected behavior of the waitlist feature. Therefore, it is unclear whether this requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided for the functionality of the waitlist for sold-out group events.
